purpose: Validate that English (and bilingual) trigger phrases reliably activate this skill after the v0.2.0 frontmatter EN translation. Pre-144, the description was Chinese-only and English prompts could miss the trigger. The Chinese trigger evals already living in test-prompts.json (upstream) cover the body / behavior; these evals exclusively probe the discoverability gap closed by the EN description rewrite.

prompts.prompt: Build me a hi-fi HTML prototype for a habit tracker iOS app — overview style, 5 screens.
expected_signals: skill matches without needing the word 'huashu' or any Chinese
iOS / app-prototype rules apply (ios_frame.jsx, info-density tier)
no AI-slop tropes (no purple gradient, no Inter)

prompts.prompt: Make a 10-page HTML pitch deck for an AI startup — 1920x1080, Junior Designer workflow.
prompts.probes: English-only trigger discoverability — slide / deck path

prompts.prompt: I have an HTML animation — export it to MP4 at 60 fps and also a palette-optimized GIF.
expected_signals: skill matches on 'export to MP4 / GIF'
prompts.probes: English-only trigger discoverability — motion export path (renderers MUST NOT match this)

prompts.prompt: I'm not sure what visual style to go with — recommend 3 design directions for a fintech dashboard.
expected_signals: skill matches on 'design direction / visual style'
fallback advisor mode (5 schools x 20 philosophies)
prompts.probes: English-only trigger discoverability — design-direction advisor fallback

prompts.prompt: Review this design for me — score it on a 5-axis expert critique and give me a fix list.
expected_signals: 5-axis expert critique invoked (philosophy / hierarchy / detail / function / innovation)
prompts.probes: English-only trigger discoverability — review / critique path

prompts.prompt: 做一个 SaaS 产品的登录页，给我 3 个风格方向对比看看
expected_signals: Chinese trigger phrases still match (description_zh preserved under metadata)
prompts.probes: Bilingual users — Chinese path must NOT regress after EN description rewrite
